name: io.github.verifyax/mcp-server
title: VerifyAX
description: Evaluate, benchmark, and simulate AI agents on the VerifyAX agent-evaluation platform.

environmentVariables.name: VERIFYAX_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: VerifyAX API key (Settings -> API Keys in the console). Sent to the gateway as Authorization: Bearer.

environmentVariables.name: VERIFYAX_MCP_LOG_LEVEL
environmentVariables.description: Log verbosity written to stderr: debug | info | warn | error | silent (default info).
